narrative:
West Chester Twp 21 (precinct in Butler County) has 1,352 registered voters, with 61.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.8%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.3 percentage points.
